[SQL: WITH owner_counts AS (
  SELECT caseid__c, COUNT(*) AS owner_assignments
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE lower(field__c) LIKE '%%owner%%'
  GROUP BY caseid__c

WHERE oc.owner_assignments = 1
  AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND c.closeddate >= '2023-05-02' AND c.closeddate <= '2023-09-02'
GROUP BY c.ownerid
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;]

args.query:
WITH owner_counts AS (
  SELECT caseid__c, COUNT(*) AS owner_assignments
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE lower(field__c) LIKE '%owner%'
  GROUP BY caseid__c
)
SELECT c.ownerid AS ownerid, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate))) AS avg_seconds, COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM "Case" c
JOIN owner_counts oc ON oc.caseid__c = c.id
WHERE oc.owner_assignments = 1
  AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND c.closeddate >= '2023-05-02' AND c.closeddate <= '2023-09-02'
GROUP BY c.ownerid
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH owner_counts AS (
  SELECT caseid__c, COUNT(*) AS owner_assignments
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE lower(field__c) LIKE '%owner%'
  GROUP BY caseid__c
)
SELECT c.ownerid
FROM "Case" c
JOIN owner_counts oc ON oc.caseid__c = c.id
WHERE oc.owner_assignments = 1
  AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND (c.closeddate::timestamp) >= '2023-05-02' AND (c.closeddate::timestamp) <= '2023-09-02'
GROUP BY c.ownerid
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate::timestamp - c.createddate::timestamp))) ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query: SELECT id, caseid__c, oldvalue__c, newvalue__c, createddate, field__c FROM casehistory__c WHERE caseid__c IN ('500Wt00000DDepmIAD','500Wt00000DDyzpIAD','500Wt00000DDzUPIA1','500Wt00000DDzsbIAD','#500Wt00000DDzscIAD','500Wt00000DDzuEIAT','#500Wt00000DE02HIAT') ORDER BY caseid__c, createddate;

exec_args.sql: SELECT id, caseid__c, oldvalue__c, newvalue__c, createddate, field__c FROM casehistory__c WHERE caseid__c IN ('500Wt00000DDepmIAD','500Wt00000DDyzpIAD','500Wt00000DDzUPIA1','500Wt00000DDzsbIAD','#500Wt00000DDzscIAD','500Wt00000DDzuEIAT','#500Wt00000DE02HIAT') ORDER BY caseid__c, createddate;

args.query:
WITH owner_counts AS (
  SELECT caseid__c, COUNT(*) AS owner_assignments
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE lower(field__c) LIKE '%owner%'
  GROUP BY caseid__c
)
SELECT c.ownerid AS ownerid, COUNT(*) AS cases_count, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate::timestamp - c.createddate::timestamp))) AS avg_seconds
FROM "Case" c
JOIN owner_counts oc ON oc.caseid__c = c.id
WHERE oc.owner_assignments = 1
  AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND c.closeddate::timestamp >= '2023-05-02' AND c.closeddate::timestamp <= '2023-09-02'
GROUP BY c.ownerid
ORDER BY avg_seconds ASC;

exec_args.sql:
WITH owner_counts AS (
  SELECT caseid__c, COUNT(*) AS owner_assignments
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE lower(field__c) LIKE '%owner%'
  GROUP BY caseid__c
)
SELECT c.ownerid AS ownerid, COUNT(*) AS cases_count, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate::timestamp - c.createddate::timestamp))) AS avg_seconds
FROM "Case" c
JOIN owner_counts oc ON oc.caseid__c = c.id
WHERE oc.owner_assignments = 1
  AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND c.closeddate::timestamp >= '2023-05-02' AND c.closeddate::timestamp <= '2023-09-02'
GROUP BY c.ownerid
ORDER BY avg_seconds ASC;

args.query:
WITH owner_counts AS (
  SELECT REPLACE(caseid__c, '#', '') AS caseid_norm, COUNT(*) AS owner_assignments
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE lower(trim(field__c)) LIKE '%owner%'
  GROUP BY REPLACE(caseid__c, '#', '')
)
SELECT c.ownerid AS ownerid, COUNT(*) AS cases_count, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate::timestamp - c.createddate::timestamp))) AS avg_seconds
FROM "Case" c
JOIN owner_counts oc ON oc.caseid_norm = c.id
WHERE oc.owner_assignments = 1
  AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND c.closeddate::timestamp >= '2023-05-02' AND c.closeddate::timestamp <= '2023-09-02'
GROUP BY c.ownerid
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_seconds ASC;

exec_args.sql:
WITH owner_counts AS (
  SELECT REPLACE(caseid__c, '#', '') AS caseid_norm, COUNT(*) AS owner_assignments
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE lower(trim(field__c)) LIKE '%owner%'
  GROUP BY REPLACE(caseid__c, '#', '')
)
SELECT c.ownerid AS ownerid, COUNT(*) AS cases_count, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate::timestamp - c.createddate::timestamp))) AS avg_seconds
FROM "Case" c
JOIN owner_counts oc ON oc.caseid_norm = c.id
WHERE oc.owner_assignments = 1
  AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND c.closeddate::timestamp >= '2023-05-02' AND c.closeddate::timestamp <= '2023-09-02'
GROUP BY c.ownerid
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_seconds ASC;

args.query:
SELECT REPLACE(newvalue__c, '#', '') AS agentid, COUNT(DISTINCT REPLACE(caseid__c, '#', '')) AS cases_handled
FROM casehistory__c
WHERE lower(field__c) LIKE '%owner%'
  AND newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
  AND lower(newvalue__c) <> 'none'
GROUP BY REPLACE(newvalue__c, '#', '')
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT REPLACE(caseid__c, '#', '')) > 1
ORDER BY cases_handled DESC;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT REPLACE(newvalue__c, '#', '') AS agentid, COUNT(DISTINCT REPLACE(caseid__c, '#', '')) AS cases_handled
FROM casehistory__c
WHERE lower(field__c) LIKE '%owner%'
  AND newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
  AND lower(newvalue__c) <> 'none'
GROUP BY REPLACE(newvalue__c, '#', '')
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT REPLACE(caseid__c, '#', '')) > 1
ORDER BY cases_handled DESC;

args.query:
WITH owner_counts AS (
  SELECT REPLACE(caseid__c, '#', '') AS caseid_norm, COUNT(*) AS owner_assignments
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE lower(trim(field__c)) LIKE '%owner%'
  GROUP BY REPLACE(caseid__c, '#', '')
),
agents_multi AS (
  SELECT REPLACE(newvalue__c, '#', '') AS agentid, COUNT(DISTINCT REPLACE(caseid__c, '#', '')) AS cases_handled
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE lower(trim(field__c)) LIKE '%owner%'
    AND newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    AND lower(newvalue__c) <> 'none'
  GROUP BY REPLACE(newvalue__c, '#', '')
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT REPLACE(caseid__c, '#', '')) > 1
),
cases AS (
  SELECT id, ownerid, createddate::timestamp AS created_ts, closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND closeddate::timestamp >= '2023-05-02' AND closeddate::timestamp <= '2023-09-02'
)
SELECT a.agentid
FROM agents_multi a
JOIN cases c ON c.ownerid = a.agentid
JOIN owner_counts oc ON oc.caseid_norm = c.id
WHERE oc.owner_assignments = 1
GROUP BY a.agentid
HAVING COUNT(*) > 0
ORDER BY AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closed_ts - c.created_ts))) ASC
LIMIT 1;

  WHERE lower(trim(field__c)) LIKE '%owner%'
  GROUP BY REPLACE(caseid__c, '#', '')
),
agents_multi AS (
  SELECT REPLACE(newvalue__c, '#', '') AS agentid, COUNT(DISTINCT REPLACE(caseid__c, '#', '')) AS cases_handled
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE lower(trim(field__c)) LIKE '%owner%'
    AND newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    AND lower(newvalue__c) <> 'none'
  GROUP BY REPLACE(newvalue__c, '#', '')
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT REPLACE(caseid__c, '#', '')) > 1
),
cases AS (
  SELECT id, ownerid, createddate::timestamp AS created_ts, closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND closeddate::timestamp >= '2023-05-02' AND closeddate::timestamp <= '2023-09-02'
)
SELECT a.agentid
FROM agents_multi a
JOIN cases c ON c.ownerid = a.agentid
JOIN owner_counts oc ON oc.caseid_norm = c.id
WHERE oc.owner_assignments = 1
GROUP BY a.agentid
HAVING COUNT(*) > 0
ORDER BY AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closed_ts - c.created_ts))) ASC
LIMIT 1;
